description: Dashboard — Auris home screen. Main entry point displaying training stats and a game-card launchpad. Monochrome DAW aesthetic, no auth, localStorage only.

userStories.title: LocalStorage stats helper
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a typed helper to read and write the AurisStats object from localStorage so every future game can share the same data structure.
acceptanceCriteria: File src/lib/stats.ts exports: type AurisStats = { sessionsPlayed: number; bestScore: number; lastPlayed: string | null }
getStats(): AurisStats reads from localStorage key 'auris:stats', returns { sessionsPlayed: 0, bestScore: 0, lastPlayed: null } as default when missing or malformed
saveStats(stats: AurisStats): void serialises and writes to localStorage key 'auris:stats'
Both functions guard against SSR: if localStorage is not available (typeof window === 'undefined'), getStats returns defaults and saveStats is a no-op
Unit test file src/lib/stats.test.ts covers: (1) getStats returns defaults on empty localStorage, (2) saveStats then getStats round-trips all fields correctly
stats.ts must NOT be imported from any file under src/lib/server/
pnpm check passes
pnpm lint passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: App shell — root layout and top bar
userStories.description: As a user, I want a persistent top bar with the Auris wordmark on every page so I always know which app I'm in and can navigate home.
acceptanceCriteria: src/app.html has class="dark" on the <html> element
src/routes/+layout.svelte renders a <TopBar /> component above a <slot /> (Svelte 5: use {@render children()} instead of <slot />)
TopBar component lives at src/lib/components/top-bar.svelte
TopBar is a <header> with: h-12, sticky top-0 z-10, bg-background border-b border-border
TopBar contains the wordmark as <a href="/"> with text 'AURIS', styled: text-sm font-semibold tracking-widest uppercase text-foreground no-underline hover:opacity-80
TopBar has no login button, avatar, or any other interactive element
Read tasks/design-dashboard.md section '3. Components > Custom Components Needed > TopBar' before implementing
Use the Svelte MCP (list-sections then get-documentation) before writing any .svelte file
Run svelte-autofixer on every .svelte file written and fix all reported issues
pnpm check passes
pnpm lint passes
Verify in browser: top bar is visible at http://localhost:5173, wordmark 'AURIS' renders, clicking wordmark navigates to /

userStories.title: Dashboard route — page scaffold
userStories.description: As a user, I want a home page at / so I have a starting point when I open the app.
acceptanceCriteria: src/routes/+page.svelte exists and renders without runtime errors
<svelte:head> sets <title>Auris</title>
Page has a <main> element with: max-w-3xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8
Background is dark via the .dark class applied to <html> (from US-002)
Page renders two placeholder sections: one for stats panel, one for game card grid (can be empty divs at this stage)
Use the Svelte MCP (list-sections then get-documentation) before writing any .svelte file
Run svelte-autofixer on every .svelte file written and fix all reported issues
pnpm check passes
pnpm lint passes
Verify in browser: http://localhost:5173 shows a dark page with the top bar from US-002, page title is 'Auris'

userStories.title: Stats summary panel with empty states
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my training stats (sessions played, best score, last played) on the dashboard so I can track my progress over time.
acceptanceCriteria: StatsPanel component lives at src/lib/components/stats-panel.svelte
Component imports getStats from src/lib/stats.ts and AurisStats type
Internal state: one $state variable of type AurisStats | null, initialised to null
A $effect reads localStorage via getStats() on mount (browser-only: import { browser } from '$app/environment' and guard the call)
Displays three stat readouts: 'SESSIONS PLAYED', 'BEST SCORE', 'LAST PLAYED'
Display rules: sessionsPlayed === 0 → show '—'; bestScore === 0 → show '—'; lastPlayed === null → show '—'; otherwise show the stored YYYY-MM-DD string as-is
Layout: <section aria-label="Training statistics"> with bg-card border border-border rounded-lg p-5; inner grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 divide-y sm:divide-y-0 sm:divide-x divide-border
Each stat uses a <dl> with <dt> (label, text-xs tracking-widest uppercase text-muted-foreground) and <dd> (value, text-2xl font-semibold tabular-nums text-foreground)
When value is '—', the <dd> has aria-label describing the field and 'no data', e.g. aria-label="Sessions played: no data"
StatsPanel is rendered inside the <main> of src/routes/+page.svelte
Read tasks/design-dashboard.md section '3. Components > Custom Components Needed > StatsPanel' before implementing
Use the Svelte MCP (list-sections then get-documentation) before writing any .svelte file
Run svelte-autofixer on every .svelte file written and fix all reported issues
pnpm check passes
pnpm lint passes
Verify in browser: stats panel renders on http://localhost:5173 with all three fields showing '—' on a fresh session (clear localStorage first)

userStories.title: Game card grid
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the available training games in a card grid so I know what I can practice and what is coming.
acceptanceCriteria: shadcn-svelte card and button components are present in src/lib/components/ui/; if missing, run: pnpm dlx shadcn-svelte@latest add card button
GameCard component lives at src/lib/components/game-card.svelte
GameCard props: title: string, description: string, href: string, available: boolean (default false)
When available is false: Button variant='outline' size='sm' is disabled with label 'COMING SOON', tracking-widest uppercase text-xs; Card.Root has no hover classes (completely inert)
When available is true: Button is enabled with label 'PLAY' and links to href
Uses Card.Root, Card.Header, Card.Title, Card.Description, Card.Footer, Button from shadcn-svelte
Card.Root class: flex flex-col justify-between h-full

src/routes/+page.svelte defines a static GAMES array: [{ title: 'EQ Matching', description: 'Match the EQ curve by ear', href: '/games/eq-matching', available: false }, { title: 'Frequency ID', description: 'Identify the boosted frequency band', href: '/games/frequency-id', available: false }, { title: 'Dynamics', description: 'Recognize compression characteristics', href: '/games/dynamics', available: false }]
Grid renders as <section aria-label="Training modules"> > <ul role="list" class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4"> with each card in a <li>
A section heading <h2> with text 'TRAINING MODULES' styled text-xs font-medium tracking-widest uppercase text-muted-foreground appears above the grid
Read tasks/design-dashboard.md section '3. Components > Custom Components Needed > GameCard' before implementing
Use the Svelte MCP (list-sections then get-documentation) before writing any .svelte file
Run svelte-autofixer on every .svelte file written and fix all reported issues
pnpm check passes
pnpm lint passes
Verify in browser: three game cards render at http://localhost:5173, each shows title, description, and a disabled 'COMING SOON' button; no hover effect on cards
